localizations.rules_welcome_1: Welcome! This document will allow you to learn the game rules step-by-step.
localizations.rules_welcome_2: You can play UNLOCK! solo or as a team.
localizations.rules_welcome_3: Either solo or as a team, you will play a puzzle-packed adventure. In general, the objective is provided in the introduction.
localizations.rules_welcome_4: The object of the game is to finish the adventure before the countdown ends.
localizations.rules_welcome_5:
Are you ready?
Sit at a table and take the cards of the Unlock! adventure you chose without looking at them!
localizations.rules_welcome_6: Distribute the cards facedown as evenly as possible among the players. Do not reveal nor spread them.
localizations.rules_launch_1: In the app, select the adventure you are about to play.
localizations.rules_launch_2: Read the introduction card aloud and go with the flow!
localizations.rules_cards_1: When you see a circled number or letter on a card…
localizations.rules_cards_2: …look for the matching card in the deck…
localizations.rules_hidden_1: There are sometimes hidden numbers on the cards.
localizations.rules_hidden_2: If you spot them, look for the matching cards in the deck...
localizations.rules_redblue_1: You can combine red and blue cards.
localizations.rules_redblue_2: To combine a blue card with a red card, just add their numbers together.
localizations.rules_modifiers_1: Blue modifiers “+XX” can be reproduced on some cards (gray, in most instances).
localizations.rules_modifiers_2: You can add such a modifier to the number of a red card.
localizations.rules_modifiers_3:
Take the card matching the result and reveal it.
The combination is incorrect if you can’t find the card you are looking for.
localizations.rules_modifiers_4: You can also combine a red modifier “+XX” with the number of a blue card.
localizations.rules_penalties_1: The combination of these cards is done in a logical way. Otherwise, you will reveal Penalty cards…
localizations.rules_penalties_2: … You will then have to press the Penalty button in the app and may lose time.
localizations.rules_machine_1: To access a machine, press the following button in the app:
localizations.rules_machine_2: and enter the number of the corresponding green card.
localizations.rules_machine_3: The machine will then be displayed on your screen.
localizations.rules_machine_4: As a general rule, you will have to guess the machine logic. Once you solve its puzzle, the machine will often provide the number of one or more cards that will allow you to continue your adventure.
localizations.rules_code_1: The yellow cards are codes to be found.
localizations.rules_code_2: To enter a code, press the following button in the app:
localizations.rules_code_3: You will see a sequence of numbers appear on the screen. Enter your 4-digit combination.
localizations.rules_code_4: More often than not, you will have to guess the code logic. Once you find the code, the app will provide the numbers of one or more cards that will allow you to continue your adventure.
localizations.rules_discard_1: The top of some cards displays crossed-outnumbers or letters.
localizations.rules_discard_2: You must immediately discard the corresponding cards as they will not be used again during the game.
localizations.rules_app_1: The app is required to play: it is the “game master.”
localizations.rules_app_2: It allows managing the time via the countdown,
localizations.rules_outro_1:
Congratulations!
You now know the rules of the game!
localizations.rules_outro_2: Always keep in mind that Unlock is a game of logical puzzles. No knowledge is necessary for solving the adventure.
localizations.rules_outro_3:
Select your adventure in the app, read the introduction card aloud…
and enjoy!
